title: Rollbacks
excerpt: description: Instantly revert your Cloudflare Pages project to a previous production deployment. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Rollbacks allow you to instantly revert your project to a previous production deployment. Any production deployment that has been successfully built is a valid rollback target. When your project has rolled back to a previous deployment, you may still rollback to deployments that are newer than your current version. Note that preview deployments are not valid rollback targets.
